achievements.title: Returned Alive
achievements.description: Return to town after your first adventure into the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Rookie Hunter
achievements.description: Reach floor 10 of the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Experienced Hunter
achievements.description: Reach floor 20 of the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Master Hunter
achievements.description: Reach floor 30 of the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: You Killed My Father
achievements.description: Encounter Beldo.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Guy Avenged
achievements.description: Return home safely after confronting Beldo at the top of the tower.

achievements.description: Woo Nico Southey.

achievements.description: Pay for the final House upgrade.

achievements.description: Pay for the final Hut upgrade.

achievements.description: Return the Water Medal and restore the Wookie Wookie Pool to its former glory.

achievements.description: Pay for the upgrade to the Hospital.

achievements.title: Megachurch
achievements.description: Pay for the upgrade to the Temple.

achievements.title: The Monsabaiya Derby
achievements.description: Pay for the construction of the Racing Circuit.

achievements.description: Pay for the construction of the Bowling Alley.

achievements.title: Places, Everyone!
achievements.description: Pay for the construction of the Theater.

achievements.title: Jackpot
achievements.description: Pay for the construction of the Casino.

achievements.description: Pay for the construction of the Gym.

achievements.title: Desert Farming
achievements.description: Return Guru's Oil Pot to Isaac.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Private Swim
achievements.description: Spend some private time with Vivian at the pool.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pork Parkour
achievements.description: Stand atop the spinning pig head outside the restaurant.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Poor Table Manners
achievements.description: Ruin the dining experience for everyone at the restaurant.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Dine and Dash
achievements.description: Guess what? You got it for free. Are you proud of yourself?
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Fully Furnished
achievements.description: Decorate your fully expanded house with the maximum number of all types of furniture. [Hint: See achievement comments.]
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Centerfold
achievements.description: Oh my...
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: What Does This Button Do?
achievements.description: While riding the Aura Bike, press a button to change the controls and perspective.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Take it to the Bridge
achievements.description: Bypass security and take the Aura Bike for a spin on the bridge.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Gay for Ghosh
achievements.description: The fortune teller, Mademoiselle Shiela, comes to an unfortunate conclusion about your love life.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Quack the Duck
achievements.description: Be a good brother.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Professional Gambler
achievements.description: At roulette or slots, increase your prize amount to 100,000G.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Bowling Ace
achievements.description: Achieve a total score of at least 50 in the bowling mini-game.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mole Buster
achievements.description: Achieve a total score of at least 25 in "Hit the Mole".
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: InkBall
achievements.description: Achieve a total score of at least 50 at the batting center.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Combination Bet
achievements.description: Make a winning bet at the Racing Circuit.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Nyuel Jockey
achievements.description: Win first place at the Racing Circuit.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Giddy Up!
achievements.description: Finish a lap at the Racing Circuit in under 14 seconds.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pump You Up
achievements.description: Achieve a total score of at least 40 at the gym.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Earthquake!
achievements.description: Overstay your welcome in the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Two Become One
achievements.description: Fuse two monsters.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Double Summon
achievements.description: Obtain the Blue Collar on 12F.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Divine Protection
achievements.description: Find a Holy Sword in the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Cursed Sword
achievements.description: Find a Dark Sword in the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Goodbye, Friend
achievements.description: Sacrifice your familiar to escape the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Tempered Rod
achievements.description: Find a Trained Rod in the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Nest Egg
achievements.description: Find a Roche fruit in the tower.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: I Love Gooold!
achievements.description: Use an Alchemic Scroll.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: I Can See Clearly Now
achievements.description: Use a Flat Scroll.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Sharpened Offense
achievements.description: Use Red sand to raise a weapon to +10.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Refined Defense
achievements.description: Use Blue sand to raise a shield to +10.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Koh's Magical Balls
achievements.description: Teach a monster a spell from a ball.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Class Warfare
achievements.description: Win 10 duels against Ghosh.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 1
achievements.description: Cast Flame Sword, Blizzard Sword, or Wind Cutter (or Flay Finger, Ice Finger, or Thunder Finger).
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 2
achievements.description: Cast Heat Wave, Snow Wave, or Thunder Wave.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 3
achievements.description: Cast Burning Blade, Aqua Blade, or Thunder Blade.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 4
achievements.description: Cast Fire Shoot, Snow Shoot, or Gaia Shoot.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 5
achievements.description: Cast Mt. Burn, Aqua Wheel, or Earth Shaker.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Mix Magic Lv. 6
achievements.description: Cast Dark Wave.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Make Room for Koh
achievements.description: Enter a 1-room floor, and ascend to the next floor.
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Pulunpa Protector
achievements.description: Enter the tower with a level 1 Pulunpa. Collar the Pulunpa immediately upon entry. Do not collar other monsters. Reach the 25th floor without the Pulunpa returning to the bag. [No quick save.] [Warning!: Achievement is not active unless badge appears!]
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Inexperienced Monster Tamer
achievements.description: Reach floor 25 without Koh gaining any experience. [No quick save.] [Warning!: Achievement is not active unless badge appears!]
achievements.author: Kayesay

achievements.title: Going Kohmmando
achievements.description: Enter the tower with no items or familiars and reach floor 18. [No quick save.] [Warning!: Achievement is not active unless badge appears!]
achievements.author: Kayesay
